subject: Yoed performing today
body:
-am forwarding per Tommy . FYI Yoed was excellent today as it was his first gig at Bowery Wine Co.  Introduced him to someone who is a Classical expert who is putting him in touch with more people for gigs on the local scene in NYC. 
_________________________________
Joanne Oriti
Casablanca Music
_________________________________
